object_label: II-II q.58 a.5 — Is it a general virtue?

object_label: II-II q.58 a.6 — As a general virtue, is it essentially the same as every virtue?

object_label: II-II q.58 a.10 — Is the mean of justice the real mean?

object_label: II-II q.58 a.11 — Is the act of justice to render to everyone his own?

object_label: II-II q.60 a.6 — Is judgment perverted by being usurped?

object_label: II-II q.75 a.1 — Is derision a special sin distinct from the other sins whereby one's neighbor is injured by words?

object_label: II-II q.76 a.1 — May one lawfully curse another?

object_label: II-II q.76 a.2 — May one lawfully curse an irrational creature?

object_label: II-II q.76 a.3 — Is cursing a mortal sin?
